channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 7%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer
item.description: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer

item.title: i Politics: Burnham to U-turn on demand to reverse Brexit during by-election, allies say
item.description: Burnham to U-turn on demand to reverse Brexit during by-election, allies say

item.title: i Politics: The panicked phone calls Cabinet received 'begging them not to humiliate' Starmer
item.description: The panicked phone calls Cabinet received 'begging them not to humiliate' Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Some see 'King of the North' as UK government's savior. First he needs a seat in Parliament
item.description: Some see 'King of the North' as UK government's savior. First he needs a seat in Parliament

item.title: FT UK Politics: Is being prime minister now an impossible job?
item.description: Is being prime minister now an impossible job?

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election
item.description: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election

item.title: Reuters: Starmer expected to approve $24 billion increase in UK defence spending, The Times reports - Reuters
item.description: Starmer expected to approve $24 billion increase in UK defence spending, The Times reports - Reuters

item.title: Sky News Politics: Andy Burnham gets green light to run for selection in by-election
item.description: Andy Burnham gets green light to run for selection in by-election

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Burnham kept telling MPs to keep the faith. But the search kept having setbacks. Until Simons agreed - because Makerfield is exactly the place to prove what Burnham needs to prove.
“I think being a constituency MP ra...
item.description:
Burnham kept telling MPs to keep the faith. But the search kept having setbacks. Until Simons agreed - because Makerfield is exactly the place to prove what Burnham needs to prove.
“I think being a constituency MP ra...

item.title: BBC Politics: How Rayner, Streeting and Burnham weakened PM in 12 hours of political drama
item.description: How Rayner, Streeting and Burnham weakened PM in 12 hours of political drama
